name: claude-agent-sdk
description: The Claude Agent SDK — TypeScript (@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk) + Python (claude-agent-sdk on PyPI). Covers query(), hooks, subagents, MCP, permissions, sandbox, structured outputs, sessions. Migrated from the standalone claude-agent-sdk-skill-autoupdated repo on 2026-05-17.
notes: Both SKILL-typescript.md and SKILL-python.md draw from the same code.claude.com/agent-sdk/* pages — the per-language split is on conceptual scope (idioms, types, packaging), not on source URLs.

The research agent should dispatch upstream changes to BOTH per-language surfaces when the change is language-agnostic (e.g., hooks event semantics), and to only the matching surface when language-specific (e.g., a Python-only API).
No JSON-schema-bound examples in this skill: agent-sdk content is mostly TS/Python code blocks, not JSON config. Empty schemas map disables PASS 1 of validate-examples but PASS 2 still runs.
